data.title: The paradox of Japan’s stablecoin push
data.description:
Japan has built one of the world’s most conservative stablecoin regimes. But after pioneering a comprehensive legal framework for yen-pegged stablecoins, its bank-dependent structure has been called out for limiting innovation in the decentralized finance sector. In Asia, Hong Kong, Singapore, and Japan are in the spotlight for rolling out licensing rules for stablecoin operators. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/the-paradox-of-japans-stablecoin-push/

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of $93.5957 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for three consecutive days.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $93.5957 million yesterday (October 24th, US Eastern Time). The Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF (ETH) saw the largest daily net inflow yesterday, with a net inflow of $7.3953 million, bringing ETH's total net inflow to $1.484 billion. The Blackrock ETHA ETF (ETHA) also saw the largest daily net outflow yesterday, with a net outflow of $101 million, bringing ETHA's total net inflow to $14.154 billion. As of press time, the Ethereum spot ETF's total net asset value (NAV) was $26.386 billion, with a 5.55% ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization), and a total net inflow of $14.353 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $90.605 million yesterday, with no net outflow among the twelve ETFs.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $90.605 million yesterday (October 24th, US Eastern Time). The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow yesterday was the Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a net inflow of $57.924 million, bringing FBTC's total net inflow to $12.597 billion. The second largest single-day inflow was the Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of $32.681 million, bringing IBIT's total net inflow to $65.306 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was $149.962 billion, with a net asset value ratio (market capitalization relative to the total Bitcoin market capitalization) of 6.78%, and cumulative net inflows to $61.985 billion.

data.title: Ripple now a one-stop fintech shop after closing Hidden Road acquisition
data.description:
Ripple has completed its acquisition of Hidden Road, a move that will expand its fintech services for institutional clients and boost the utility and reach of its RLUSD stablecoin.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ripple-closes-fintech-hidden-road-acquisition?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: MetaDAO co-founder: Paradigm agrees to purchase $5.9 million of META at $7.83 per unit
data.description: Proph3t, co-founder of MetaDAO, the Solana ecosystem governance project, tweeted that Paradigm has agreed to purchase $5.9 million worth of META at $7.83 per token. As with other over-the-counter (OTC) transactions, the trade was executed based on the 24-hour time-weighted average price (TWAP).

data.title: Custodia and Vantage Bank launch nationwide tokenized deposit platform
data.description:
Custodia and Vantage have launched a nationwide platform that lets banks issue blockchain-based tokens representing insured deposits.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/custodia-launches-tokenized-deposit-platform/

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETFs Experience Significant Net Outflows
data.description:
According to PANews, data from SoSoValue indicates that Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $93.59 million on October 24, 2025, Eastern Time. The Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH recorded the highest single-day net inflow of $7.3953 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $1.484 billion. Conversely, the Blackrock ETF ETHA experienced the largest single-day net outflow of $101 million, with its historical total net inflow reaching $14.154 billion.

As of the latest report, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs stands at $26.386 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio of 5.55% compared to Ethereum's total market capitalization. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $14.353 billion.

data.title: ‘It’s All One Trade’ — Crypto Bull Run Isn’t Done, Says Dan Morehead
data.description:
Pantera Capital founder and CEO Dan Morehead argues the core driver of this cycle remains the same “one trade” uniting macro and crypto: fiat debasement pushing capital into scarce, higher-beta assets. In a wide-ranging conversation with Real Vision’s Raoul Pal, the pair frame the current rally—and what comes next—through the lens of policy error, structural deficits, sticky inflation, and the slow-rolling migration of institutional and sovereign portfolios into digital assets. The Debasement Trade Powers The Crypto Bull Run Morehead’s starting point is blunt: “We have full employment. Inflation is debasing our assets by 3% a year… and they’re cutting rates
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/its-all-one-trade-crypto-bull-run-isnt-done-says-dan-morehead/

data.title: Influenced by the news of listing on Binance, GIGGLE's price surged by 130% in a short period of time.
data.description: According to market data, GIGGLE's price surged by 130% in a short period of time due to the news of its listing on Binance spot trading. The current price is US$188, with a market capitalization of US$188 million and a 24-hour trading volume of US$2,120.

data.title: Binance will list GIGGLE and F and add seed tags
data.description:
According to an official announcement, Binance will list GiggleFund (GIGGLE) and SynFutures (F) at 2:00 PM (Beijing Time) on October 25, 2025, and will open spot trading pairs for GIGGLE/USDT, GIGGLE/USDC, GIGGLE/TRY, F/USDT, F/USDC, and F/TRY.

The announcement indicates that GIGGLE and F will be given the Seed label. The Seed label represents innovative projects and may exhibit higher volatility and risk than other listed tokens. Users will need to pass a quiz and accept the terms of use every 90 days before trading Seed-labeled tokens. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: Binance Adds Giggle Fund and SynFutures to Trading Platform
data.description:
Binance lists Giggle Fund and SynFutures, boosting cryptocurrency trading options and market dynamics.
source: https://coincu.com/news/binance-lists-giggle-fund-synfutures/

data.title: Binance Will List Giggle Fund (GIGGLE) and SynFutures (F) with Seed Tag Applied
data.description: According to the announcement from Binance, Binance will list Giggle Fund (GIGGLE) and SynFutures (F) and open trading for the following spot trading pairs at 2025-10-25 06:00 (UTC).The new spot trading pairs will include: GIGGLE/USDT, GIGGLE/USDC, GIGGLE/TRY, F/USDT, F/USDC and F/TRY.Users can start depositing GIGGLE and F in preparation for trading one hour later, and withdrawals will open at 2025-10-26 06:00 (UTC).Users can now trade GIGGLE and F on Binance Alpha Market. However, once spot trading opens, GIGGLE and F will no longer be showcased on Binance Alpha, and its trading volume will no longer be counted towards Alpha Points.

data.title: A certain address purchased $46.78 million worth of SOL in the past four days.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, an address that has been purchasing SOL over-the-counter (OTC) tokens since late April has purchased 249,500 SOL tokens worth $46.78 million over the past four days through the FalconX and Wintermute platforms. This address has purchased a total of 827,000 SOL tokens worth $146 million since the end of April, all of which have been staked, at an average cost of $177.

data.title: Ethereum Emerges As The Sole Trillion-Dollar Institutional Store Of Value — Here’s Why
data.description:
The financial world is witnessing an unprecedented shift, as Ethereum solidifies its position as the sole asset capable of becoming a multi-trillion-dollar institutional store of value. ETH is the only one currently demonstrating the scale, utility, and institutional acceptance to command and securely hold multi-trillion-dollar allocations, fundamentally redefining the future of global wealth preservation and growth. Why Ethereum Is The Foundational Role For Institutional Capital Ethereum has quietly become the final form of digital trust for institutions to store trillions of dollars. A market expert and entrepreneur, partnering with OKX and MEXC, Ted Pillows, has stated on the social media platform X that ETH decentralization is nearly impossible to replicate, a network that was largely community-funded, not VC-funded, and forged through proof-of-work (PoW)
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-as-a-store-of-value/
